-- 9 of 34 --

Process Change
Big money breakthroughs are rarely
created through complete, total change
of the core business, but by changing
processes within the business.
Layaway Plans
I-Step to Lead Generation
The 	'Free Recorded Message'
Single Sale To Continuity
Bundling vs. Cafeteria
Telemarketing to TeIe-Seminar
Selling vs.Applying To Buy
Options in 2"dsale After The Sale
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 20 of 34 --

Some Of The
Enemies Of Autonomy
Conquered By Renegade Millionaires
Thinkins "but mv business is different"
Controlled bv others' opinions and beliefs
Only one opinion matters: your target: who gives or gets you money?
Worrying about what peers think
Financial advice horn the butcher
Cultivate a strong attitude toward unfounded opinion/criticism
Beware 'expert' opinions too <Disney. 	NSA. >
Controlled bv past experience
"Tried that - it didn't work"
Vance: Would still be reading with candies, cleaning up after our
transportation
Truth changes with time
Egs.: 1950: drop a st& 	in scandal - 2004: extend contract
Stephen Snyder's seminar breakthrough
Neiswonger's 2 big chgs (have to come to training; one on one close)
Slave to indust? 	norms
What is a 'norm'? 	: historical precedent. Average.
(Egs: Incredible: most public seminar co's still doing business just like Al
Lowry. I've gotten only two to use Val-Pak).
Jerry Jones: dental practices owned by non-dentists
I
Fear/Wealoless/Refusal to repel. lose. get rid of
Vacuumsfill 	..
Indecision
Lack of clarity and focus - Easilv distracted
